channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Junction of Rhyl Street and Talacre Road, 31st May
item.description:
Previous order 9496666. The bollard was put back in place a few days ago and has again been removed and can be be found in the raised bushes nearby. Also, the locking plate is damaged and therefore no padlock can be be fixed to it.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Rhyl Street, Chalk Farm, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Door entrance panel to sheltered accomodation broken on, 31st May
item.description:
The door panel on the Brook Drive sheltered accommodation is broken and repeating the message ‘calling the manager, please wait’. It is loudly audible and running 24 hours a day and has been all weekend.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 76, Brook Drive, Elephant and Castle, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: There is a dead fox on the road, 31st May
item.description:
Opposite to Nuffield center

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Sidcup By-pass, Longlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Dead animal in the carriageway or footway

item.title: Outside Ladywell House, 31st May
item.description:
There is a car outside Ladywell House, Longbury Drive that has been left there for at least months with a cover over it
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 54-68, Longbury Drive, St Paul's Cray, Orpington, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Plants growing out of Drain, 31st May
item.description:
Drains need clearing

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Wolsey Court, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped rubbish, 31st May
item.description:
Purple rubbish bag dumped at corner of Kings Hall Road and Bailes Place
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Kings Hall Road, New Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Parking in prohibited section, 31st May
item.description:
5 cars parked in the prohibited area due to construction works. Temporary traffic lights make cars can’t stop there and there are cars honking. Drivers ignore my complaint and parked anyway

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 140, Fortis Green, Muswell Hill, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly Tip, 31st May
item.description:
Between 17.30pm - 18.00pm, white van, from a hire company, driven by a dark skinned male, dumped the rubbish as shown in the pictures.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Green Way, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Outside Steve Lee Supermarket, 31st May
item.description:
Bollard has been removed for several days and lying to the side. Cars are now driving through.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 94-96, Cromer Street, King's Cross, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Illegal advertising sign on the footway outside Akin Store, Shacklewell Lane, 31st May
item.description:
Illegal advertising sign repeatedly and periodically obstructs narrow footway outside Akin Store, 2 Shacklewell Ln, London E8 2EZ. Please visit and advise the shop staff that this is a hazard for visually impaired pedestrians.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Shacklewell Lane, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Household waste dumped in road on Manor Grove, 31st May
item.description:
A van pulled up and dumped various bags and waste items on the road before driving off.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Manor Grove, Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter bin overflowing, 31st May
item.description:
Litter bin overflowing

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Parkland Walk, Finsbury Park, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned car, 31st May
item.description:
Abandoned car for 2+ years missing number plate flat tires

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Long Walk, Woolwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Car with no plates abandoned, 31st May
item.description:
Car has been parked here for weeks, without number plates.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 4, Arrol Road, Anerley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Mattress dumped on roadside, 31st May
item.description:
There is a mattress dumped on the pavement.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Amhurst Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bramble bush covering access to property, 31st May
item.description:
Hi there, I have previously explained this, but the issue is an over growing bramble bush that covers most of the path which is the only access to my rental property. The bramble bush does get trimmed, but it returns just as bad within a week. We want to remove the bramble bush to avoid any future injury’s and struggles getting into the property, especially as I have mobility issues. The brave bush is around 10 metres long and stretches along our entire path, Trimming it has only ever helped for around a week.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Ridgemount Close, Crystal Palace, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Builders left their rubbish here, 31st May
item.description:
Many weeks ago balconies in our block have been renovated. Builders unfortunately left the remains of old wood in bags outside the house. Someone then disposed of a broken bike on top. Please arrange a removal.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Saw Mill Way, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipped concrete waste, 31st May
item.description:
Flytipped concrete waste next to the tree outside 191 Leesons Hill. This is a hotspot for regular flytipping. Please can this be looked into and removed.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 193, Leesons Hill, St Paul's Cray, Orpington, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pile of black bags and rubbish, 31st May
item.description:
Pile of black bags and rubbish. It’s been here for weeks.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lucey Way, Bermondsey, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Massive amounts of rubbish, 31st May
item.description:
Bags of rubbish dumped for weeks - seems like someone moved out. Attracting vermin and heat is not helping . Thanks!

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Laburnum Street, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet
